Offer: 15% off up to Rs. 250 on booking with Tide Card
Description: Offer is exclusively valid for Tide Card members. Use code ABHITIDE to get up to Rs. 250 off on your bus booking. Offer valid on a minimum transaction value of Rs. 999 (excluding service charges and taxes). Maximum discount per transaction is up to Rs. 250. The coupon code is valid on all days during the promotional period. Offer valid only on private bus operator bookings not on SRTCs. Discount is applicable once per Tide Card per month during the offer period. This offer cannot be combined with any other ongoing promotions or discounts. AbhiBus reserves the right to disqualify any transaction at any time without prior notice or liability.

Offer: Save upto Rs.300 on UTC300 bookings
Description: Apply Coupon code UTC300 at bus booking checkout and save up to Rs.300 on UTC bus services New users will get 10% up to Rs.150 instant discount + 10% up to Rs.150 Promo AbhiBus Cashback Existing customers get 10% up to Rs.150 Promo AbhiBus Cashback This is a special offer valid for bus bookings made on AbhiBus for UTC bus bookings only No minimum transaction value applicable Offer valid only on UTC Bookings not on any other Private or Govt SRTC bus service The Promo AbhiBus Cashback will be credited to the AbhiCash wallet of the user post journey completion This offer cannot be combined with any other offer AbhiBus reserves the right to disqualify any transaction or discontinue the offer promotion at any time without notice or liability of whatsoever nature

Offer: Get Rs. 100 OFF with SBM ZET Credit Card
Description: Use code ABHIZET to get 10% discount (up to Rs. 100) on your bus booking. Offer valid on a minimum transaction value of Rs. 500 (excluding service charges and taxes). Maximum discount per transaction is Rs. 100. Discount is applicable twice per SBM ZET Credit Card per month during the offer period. Offer is exclusively valid for SBM ZET Credit Card holders. This offer cannot be combined with any other ongoing promotions or discounts.
